query_spec.intent: Determine the citation and reference relationships for the paper 'LLaMA Beyond English: An Empirical Study on Language Capability Transfer' (DOC3) based on the provided documents.
query_spec.selector: doc must mention the target paper (DOC3) to be a 'Citation' (citing DOC3), or the target paper (DOC3) must mention the doc to be a 'Reference' (DOC3 citing the doc).

projector.ref_unit_justification: The instruction explicitly requires presenting 'paper titles' in the JSON format: {"Reference":["Reference Title 1", ...], "Citation":["Citation Title 1", ...]}.

structure.summary: The structure is a fan-in where DOC1 and DOC2 both cite the central target paper DOC3, while DOC3 cites none of the other provided papers.

completeness.expected_hint: The instruction asks to 'determine the citation or reference relationship between this paper and the other papers' and to 'present the paper titles' in a specific JSON format, implying a complete enumeration of all such relationships found in the provided set.

Citation: LlamaTurk: Adapting Open-Source Generative Large Language Models for Low-Resource Language
InstructionCP: A fast approach to transfer Large Language Models into target language

structure_description: The structure is a fan-in where DOC1 and DOC2 both cite the central target paper DOC3, while DOC3 cites none of the other provided papers.
